summary: Tested all new features: Paylink endpoints, Admin pending questions workflow (import/approve/reject/approve-all), AI full18 mode, PricingPage subscribe modal, PaymentSuccessPage. 16/17 backend tests passed. All UI features verified.

minor.issue: Endpoint does not exist (404), not a new feature issue

integration_issues.issue: Clicking 'اشترك الحين' when not logged in correctly redirects to login (expected behavior). Modal with name/mobile only appears when user is logged in — this is correct flow.

critical_code_review_comments: Dead code at server.py lines 589-591 after return statement in autosave_question — unreachable code
Paylink initiate returns 503 when PAYMENT_API_ID is not set — correct behavior for preview env
GET /paylink/status/{txn} is public (no auth) and returns graceful error on failure — correct
seed_data_creation: Created and approved TEST_ prefixed questions during testing (auto-cleaned via approve-all)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working: (1) Admin مراجعة الأسئلة tab shows pending questions with import file section. (2) JSON import works correctly. (3) Approve/reject/approve-all work. (4) Paylink endpoints return 503 (no credentials in preview) not 500. (5) /api/paylink/status/{txn} is public and works. (6) PricingPage shows subscription plans with اشترك الحين buttons. (7) PaymentSuccessPage handles missing txn gracefully (shows error UI). (8) AI full18 mode endpoint exists and responds. Admin credentials: admin/hujjah2024
